mapper.select: SELECT A.POST_SN , A.BBS_SN , A.BBS_TYPE , A.TITLE , A.SUB_TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.VIEW_CNT , A.CREAT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.CREAT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS CREAT_MBER_NM , A.UDT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.UDT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS UDT_MBER_NM , A.USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREAT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS CREAT_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.UDT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS UDT_DATE FROM BBS_POST A WHERE A.BBS_SN = 1 ORDER BY A.CREAT_DE DESC

SELECT A.POST_SN , A.BBS_SN , A.BBS_TYPE , A.TITLE , A.SUB_TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.VIEW_CNT , A.CREAT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.CREAT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS CREAT_MBER_NM , A.UDT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.UDT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS UDT_MBER_NM , A.USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREAT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS CREAT_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.UDT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS UDT_DATE FROM BBS_POST A WHERE A.POST_SN = #{postSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BBS_POST (BBS_SN, BBS_TYPE, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, CONTENT, CREAT_MBER_SN, UDT_MBER_SN, USE_YN) values (#{bbsSn}, #{bbsType}, #{title}, #{subTitle}, #{content}, #{creatMberSn}, #{udtMberSn}, #{useYn})
